notes:
Proposals are scored by all Board or Panel members after the presentations by designated Board or Panel members and discussion against criteria to reflect their scientific excellence and potential impact, leading to a single median score. At the end of the meeting they are then grouped according to their median scores as a basis for further discussion, which may bring into consideration strategic priorities and portfolio balance. Final funding decisions aim to provide the optimum package of investment.

Median scores of 6 and above are considered fundable, but the funding cut-off is dependent on the budget available at any given meeting. 

Applications are listed in numerical order within blocks according to i) their median score groups and ii) their funding outcome. No ranking within blocks should be inferred.
meeting_name: Newton Fund UK-Thailand: Joint Health Research Call - Scientific Remit: Cancer
